compiled_state.title: README incorrectly lists Ticket as an external dependency
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description: The README file lists Ticket as a dependency when it is actually a native part of this plugin (the event-sourced ticket system on the orphan tickets branch). The README should be updated to accurately reflect the project architecture — Ticket is a built-in capability, not an external dependency.

comments.body: Classification: mechanical (doc error — README lists Ticket as external dependency when it is native).
comments.author: Test
